info.title: Rapidata Audience API
info.description: The API for the Rapidata Audience service

patch.summary: Changes the owner of the specified audience.

parameters.name: audienceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the audience.

requestBody.description: The properties of the audience to create.

parameters.name: audienceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the audience to delete.

get.summary: Returns the audience with the specified id.

parameters.name: audienceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the audience.

parameters.name: audienceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the audience to update.

get.summary: Returns the audience state recalculation with the given id.

parameters.name: recalculationId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the recalculation.

get.summary: Gets the count of users in each state for the specified audience.

parameters.name: audienceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the audience.

get.summary: Returns the most recent audience state recalculation for the given audience, regardless of state.

parameters.name: audienceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the audience.

post.summary:
Uploads a CSV file containing user IDs and scores, then processes it in the background
 to seed the audience with those users.

parameters.name: audienceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the audience to initialize.

requestBody.description: A CSV file with columns: userId, score.

post.summary: Rebuilds the distilling campaign for the specified audience.
post.description:
Recalculates campaign filters and selections based on the audience's current settings
 (demographic filters, exit conditions, etc.).

parameters.name: audienceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the audience.

post.summary: Recreates external audiences for the specified audience.

parameters.name: audienceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the audience.

requestBody.description: Configuration for which external audiences to recreate.

post.summary: Resumes the distillation campaign for the specified audience.

parameters.name: audienceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the audience.

post.summary: Starts recruiting users for the specified audience.

parameters.name: audienceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the audience.

patch.summary: Updates the boost configuration for the specified audience.

parameters.name: audienceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the audience.

requestBody.description: The boost configuration values to update.

post.summary: Adds a new example to an audience.

parameters.name: audienceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the audience.

parameters.name: exampleId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the example to delete.

get.summary: Queries all examples for the specified audience.

parameters.name: audienceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the audience.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The 1-based page index.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of items per page.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort fields. Prefix with - for descending order (e.g. -created_at).

parameters.name: visibility
parameters.description: Filter by visibility.

parameters.name: is_common_sense
parameters.description: Filter by is_common_sense.

patch.summary: Updates an example's properties within an audience.

parameters.name: audienceId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the audience.

parameters.name: exampleId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the example to update.

asset.description: The asset to use for the example.

payload.description: The payload to use for the example.

truth.description: The ground truth for the example.

randomCorrectProbability.description: The probability for an answer to be correct when randomly guessing.

explanation.description: An explanation for the users if they answer the example incorrectly.

context.description: An optional textual context that provides additional information to the user.

contextAsset.description: An optional asset that provides additional context to the user.

sortIndex.description:
The sort index that controls the serving order of this example within the audience.
 When null, the next sort index is automatically calculated.

featureFlags.description: The feature flags to enable for the example.

isCommonSense.description:
Whether this example should be treated as commonsense validation.
 When true, incorrect answers are not accepted and the example affects global score.
 When null, AI auto-detection will determine if the example is common sense.

visibility.description:
Controls who can see this example. Public examples are visible to all customers.
 Private examples are only visible to the customer who created them and admins.
 Defaults to Private.

AddExampleToAudienceEndpoint_Input.description: Input model for adding an example to an audience.

recalculationId.description:
The id of the audience state recalculation dispatched as a result of adding this example.
 Null when the example addition cannot transition any user's state (e.g. the audience
 already has more examples than MaxDistillingResponses + 1).

ownerId.description: The unique identifier of the new owner.

ownerMail.description: The email address of the new owner.

name.description: The name to give the newly created audience.

description.description: An optional markdown-supported description of the audience's purpose.

filters.description:
The filters to apply to any orders created for this audience.
 A filter can be used to restrict the audience to a specific subset of users.

graduationScore.description: The score used to determine whether a user graduates from the distilling campaign.

demotionScore.description:
Score below which a graduated user is demoted back to distilling.
 Must be less than or equal to GraduationScore. Defaults to null (uses GraduationScore).

minimumSizeForActivation.description: The minimum number of users required for an audience to be activated.

logo.description: An optional logo image for the audience. Must be an existing image asset.

maxDistillingResponses.description:
Maximum responses before user exits the distilling campaign.
 Defaults to 10. Set to null to disable this exit condition.

dropMinResponses.description:
Minimum responses before the drop score check applies.
 Users need at least this many responses before they can be kicked out for low score.
 Defaults to 3. Set to null to apply drop score check from the first response.

dropScore.description:
Score floor - users below this score exit the distilling campaign
 (only after completing DropMinResponses).
 Defaults to 0.2. Set to null to disable this exit condition.

isDistillingCampaignSticky.description:
Whether the distilling campaign should be sticky (users stay until filters don't match).
 Defaults to true (Temporary sticky).

maxDistillingSessions.description:
Maximum sessions (rapid retrievals) before user exits the distilling campaign.
 Defaults to null (disabled). Set to a value to enable session-based exit condition.

inactivityDropDays.description:
Number of days of inactivity before a distilling user is dropped.
 Defaults to null (disabled).

minSubmissionRate.description:
Minimum submission rate (responses / sessions) before a user is dropped.
 Defaults to null (disabled).

minSessionsForSubmissionRate.description:
Minimum number of sessions before the submission rate check applies.
 Defaults to null (applies from first session).

minSubmissionRateGraduated.description:
Minimum submission rate for graduated users. If null, MinSubmissionRate applies to graduated users.
 Set a lower value to be more lenient with graduated users.

distillingRetrievalMode.description:
The retrieval mode used by the distilling campaign to select rapids for users.
 Defaults to Shuffled.

minDistillingForGlobalBoost.description:
Minimum distilling users before disabling global boost.
 Defaults to 200. Admin-only override.

minGraduatedForDistillingBoost.description:
Minimum graduated users before disabling distilling boost.
 Defaults to 100. Admin-only override.

audienceId.description: The unique identifier of the newly created audience.

recalculationId.description:
The id of the audience state recalculation dispatched as a result of this deletion.
 Null when the deletion cannot transition any user's state (e.g. the audience still has
 more examples than MaxDistillingResponses + 1 after the delete).

id.description: The unique identifier of the audience.

description.description: The markdown-supported description of the audience.

status.description: The current status of the audience.

qualifiedUserCount.description: The number of users that have qualified for this audience.

filters.description: The filters applied to this audience.

logo.description: The URL of the audience logo, if any.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the audience was created.

ownerMail.description: The email of the audience owner.

isPublic.description: Whether the audience is publicly visible.

isDistilling.description: Whether the audience is currently distilling users.

distillingCampaignId.description: The id of the distilling campaign associated with the audience.

minGraduatedForDistillingBoost.description: Minimum graduated users before disabling distilling boost.

minDistillingForGlobalBoost.description: Minimum distilling users before disabling global boost.

graduationScore.description: The score used to determine whether a user graduates from the distilling campaign.

demotionScore.description: Score below which a graduated user is demoted back to distilling.

maxDistillingResponses.description: Maximum responses before user exits the distilling campaign.

dropMinResponses.description: Minimum responses before the drop score check applies.

dropScore.description: Score floor - users below this score exit the distilling campaign.

maxDistillingSessions.description: Maximum sessions before user exits the distilling campaign.

inactivityDropDays.description: Number of days of inactivity before a distilling user is dropped.

minSubmissionRate.description: Minimum submission rate before a user is dropped.

minSessionsForSubmissionRate.description: Minimum number of sessions before the submission rate check applies.

minSubmissionRateGraduated.description: Minimum submission rate for graduated users.

distillingRetrievalMode.description: The retrieval mode used by the distilling campaign to select rapids for users.

boostLevel.description: The current boost level applied to the audience.

randomAdmissionProbability.description: The probability of admitting a random user to the audience.

health.description: The health score of the audience.

id.description: The unique identifier of the recalculation.

audienceId.description: The audience this recalculation belongs to.

state.description: The current state of the recalculation.

phase.description: The current phase within the recalculation lifecycle.

lastProcessedUserId.description: The id of the last user that was processed (progress cursor).

processedCount.description: The number of users processed so far.

changedCount.description: The number of users whose state was changed by the recalculation.

errorMessage.description: Error message populated when the recalculation transitioned to Failed.

startedAt.description: When the recalculation began processing (null while still Pending).

lastHeartbeatAt.description: Timestamp of the last heartbeat received from the worker.

completedAt.description: When the recalculation reached a terminal state (Completed, Failed, Aborted).

id.description: The unique identifier of the recalculation.

audienceId.description: The audience this recalculation belongs to.

state.description: The current state of the recalculation.

phase.description: The current phase within the recalculation lifecycle.

lastProcessedUserId.description: The id of the last user that was processed (progress cursor).

processedCount.description: The number of users processed so far.

changedCount.description: The number of users whose state was changed by the recalculation.

errorMessage.description: Error message populated when the recalculation transitioned to Failed.

startedAt.description: When the recalculation began processing (null while still Pending).

lastHeartbeatAt.description: Timestamp of the last heartbeat received from the worker.

completedAt.description: When the recalculation reached a terminal state (Completed, Failed, Aborted).

id.description: The unique identifier of the audience.

description.description: The markdown-supported description of the audience.

status.description: The current status of the audience.

qualifiedUserCount.description: The number of users that have qualified for this audience.

filters.description: The filters applied to this audience.

logo.description: The URL of the audience logo, if any.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the audience was created.

ownerMail.description: The email of the audience owner.

isPublic.description: Whether the audience is publicly visible.

isDistilling.description: Whether the audience is currently distilling users.

randomAdmissionProbability.description: The probability of admitting a random user to the audience.

health.description: The health score of the audience.

id.description: The unique identifier of the example.

rapidId.description: The ID of the rapid associated with this example.

asset.description: The asset associated with this example.

truth.description: The truth value of the example.

context.description: The context text for the example.

contextAsset.description: The context asset for the example.

randomCorrectProbability.description: The probability of a random correct answer.

isCommonSense.description: Whether this example is common sense.

sortIndex.description: The sort index that controls serving order.

visibility.description: The visibility of this example. Public examples are visible to all customers.

recreateAll.description: Whether to recreate all 3 external audiences or only the missing ones.

name.description: The new name to give to this audience.

description.description: The new description for the audience. Supports markdown. Set to null to remove.

filters.description:
The new filters to apply to any orders created for this audience.
 A filter can be used to restrict the audience to a specific subset of users.

logo.description:
The new logo image for the audience. Must be an existing image asset.
 Set to null to remove the logo.

minGraduatedForDistillingBoost.description:
Minimum graduated users before disabling distilling boost.
 When graduated count is below this, external distilling audience ID is added to campaign boosting.

minDistillingForGlobalBoost.description:
Minimum distilling users before disabling global boost.
 When distilling count is below this, GlobalBoostLevel is set above zero.

graduationScore.description: The score used to determine whether a user graduates from the distilling campaign.

demotionScore.description:
Score below which a graduated user is demoted back to distilling.
 Must be less than or equal to GraduationScore. Set to null to use GraduationScore.

maxDistillingResponses.description:
Maximum responses before user exits the distilling campaign.
 Set to null to disable this exit condition.

dropMinResponses.description:
Minimum responses before the drop score check applies.
 Users need at least this many responses before they can be kicked out for low score.
 Set to null to apply drop score check from the first response.

dropScore.description:
Score floor - users below this score exit the distilling campaign
 (only after completing DropMinResponses).
 Set to null to disable this exit condition.

maxDistillingSessions.description:
Maximum sessions (rapid retrievals) before user exits the distilling campaign.
 Set to a value to enable session-based exit condition.

inactivityDropDays.description:
Number of days of inactivity before a distilling user is dropped.
 Set to null to disable this exit condition.

minSubmissionRate.description:
Minimum submission rate (responses / sessions) before a user is dropped.
 Set to null to disable this exit condition.

minSessionsForSubmissionRate.description:
Minimum number of sessions before the submission rate check applies.
 Set to null to apply from the first session.

minSubmissionRateGraduated.description:
Minimum submission rate for graduated users. If null, MinSubmissionRate applies to graduated users.
 Set a lower value to be more lenient with graduated users.

distillingRetrievalMode.description: The retrieval mode used by the distilling campaign to select rapids for users.

explanation.description: The optional explanation that will be shown to the user when answering wrong.

context.description: An optional text context that will be shown to the user.

contextAsset.description: An optional asset that will be used as context to show to the user.

randomCorrectProbability.description: The probability that if the user answers at random that they'll be correct.

isCommonSense.description: Whether this example should be treated as commonsense validation.

sortIndex.description: The sort index that controls the serving order of this example.

visibility.description:
Controls who can see this example. Public examples are visible to all customers.
 Private examples are only visible to the customer who created them and admins.

UpdateAudienceExampleEndpoint_Input.description: Input model for updating an audience example.

minDistillingForGlobalBoost.description: Minimum number of distilling users required to activate global boost.

minGraduatedForDistillingBoost.description: Minimum number of graduated users required to activate distilling boost.

recalculationId.description:
The id of the audience state recalculation dispatched by this update.
 Boost-only updates do not trigger a recalculation, so this is typically null.

Bearer.description: JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme

OAuth2.description: OAuth2 authorization header using the Bearer scheme
